title: Wallet DB migration: diversifier_index column
description: Add diversifier_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 to the wallet DB accounts table (or a new table if accounts doesn't exist yet). Follow the existing PRAGMA user_version migration pattern (design-wallet-db-migration memory). This is the storage layer for the diversified subaddress bead. Use a subagent to read wallet/src/store.rs and identify the current schema version and migration block structure before writing any SQL. Defensive programming: migration must be idempotent (safe to run twice); write a test that populates the DB with v_n data, runs the migration to v_n+1, and asserts the column exists with the correct default.
acceptance_criteria: v_prev_data_survives_migration test passes. Schema migration is append-only (no existing migration blocks modified). Column type matches SQLite INTEGER semantics (stores u128 as TEXT to avoid sign bit truncation — use TEXT not INTEGER for diversifier index).
